name: Tremorscale
location: Guardian Council in Volenfell, Glirion the Redbeard

bonuses.stat: When you activate a taunt ability on an enemy, you cause a duneripper to burst from the ground beneath them after 1 second, dealing 0 Physical damage to all enemies within 4 meters and reducing their Armor by 0 for 15 seconds. This effect can occur once every 10 seconds and scales off the higher of your Physical or Spell Resistance.
